key_threats: UNBEATEN — 9 wins from 9 games with an extraordinary NRR of +5.28
Dominant batting: NRR +5.28 means they are winning by massive margins — deep batting lineup
Experienced pressure players — have been in winning positions all season
Top of Group B by a significant margin — likely have several match-winners
key_weaknesses: Overconfidence — unbeaten sides sometimes underestimate opponents
No experience of losing situations — may struggle if WW put them under pressure early
High NRR games mean they may have faced weaker opposition — quality of wins unknown

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: This is a true upset game. Bowl Ajinkya Pradhan and Yuvraj Rajpurohit in extended spells from the first ball. Aim to keep Pway Cubs under 80 — their batters will expect easy runs against weaker sides.
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: Consider fielding first if you win the toss to assess their batting. Use Namit Rathi (2.83 econ) early as a surprise containment weapon. WW will need a near-perfect team performance to win this one.
